mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, p.post_name, r.role_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN role r ON e.role_id = r.id ORDER BY e.id DESC

SELECT e.*, d.dept_name, p.post_name, r.role_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id LEFT JOIN role r ON e.role_id = r.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (emp_no, name, gender, phone, email, department_id, position_id, role_id, entry_date, status, address, remark) VALUES (#{empNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{roleId}, #{entryDate}, #{status}, #{address}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE status = 1

SELECT d.dept_name AS departmentName, COUNT(e.id) AS employeeCount FROM department d LEFT JOIN employee e ON d.id = e.department_id AND e.status = 1 GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name ORDER BY employeeCount DESC
